segments.text: Oh, excellent DI, yeah, yeah, yeah.
So difficult to punish that up B to Ball, has to tread lightly.
And just neck and neck between these guys, Gachipi draws first.

full_text: Oh, excellent DI, yeah, yeah, yeah. Okay. So difficult to punish that up B to Ball, has to tread lightly. And just neck and neck between these guys, Gachipi draws first.

corrections.corrected: punish that up B to Ball
